sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals Hands IRS Defeat in Limited Partner Definition Case
feed.summary: The Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals ruled in Sirius Solutions, LLLP v. Commissioner that a "limited partner" for self-employment tax purposes is defined by limited liability under state law, overturning the IRS's attempt to impose self-employment tax on their distributive shares. This decision may lead to refund claims for individuals who paid self-employment tax on limited partner interests and could influence future partnership filing positions, although its direct application to LLCs and LLPs remains uncertain. The IRS might petition for a rehearing or nonacquiesce, with similar cases pending in other circuit courts.

feed.title: RB Global declares quarterly dividend of $0.31 per share
feed.summary: RB Global, Inc. announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.31 per common share, payable on March 2, 2026, to shareholders of record on February 9, 2026. The company, an omnichannel marketplace for commercial assets and vehicles, also reported strong third-quarter 2025 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue. Additionally, National Bank Financial upgraded RB Global's stock to Outperform and raised its price target, citing recent contract wins and market share gains.

feed.title: RB Global to Pay Quarterly Dividend of $0.31 a Share, Payable March 2 to Holders of Record Feb. 9
feed.summary: RB Global, Inc. has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.31 per share. This dividend is payable on March 2 to shareholders of record as of February 9. The announcement was made on January 20, 2026.

feed.title: RB Global (RBA) Declares $0.31 Quarterly Dividend; 1.1% Yield
feed.summary: RB Global (RBA) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.31 per share, totaling $1.24 annualized, resulting in an annual yield of 1.1 percent. The dividend is payable on March 2, 2026, to stockholders of record on February 9, 2026, with an ex-dividend date of February 6, 2026. The company's stock currently trades at $113.25, with an overall analyst rating of SELL.

feed.title: RB Global, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: RB Global, Inc. (NYSE and TSX: RBA) has announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.31 per common share. This dividend is payable on March 2, 2026, to shareholders of record on February 9, 2026, and is considered an eligible dividend for Canadian income tax purposes. RB Global is a leading omnichannel marketplace and provider of value-added insights and transaction solutions for commercial assets and vehicles globally.

feed.title: Immuron delivers continued sales growth across key global markets
feed.summary: Immuron (ASX:IMC) reported continued sales growth in its key global markets for the first half, driven primarily by strong performance of its Travelan immune supplement in Australia and the United States. The company recorded overall sales of $4.2 million, a 5% increase, with significant gains from marketing efforts and new product launches, despite mixed results in Canada. Immuron aims to expand distribution and leverage its oral immunotherapy platform for future growth.

feed.title: Edison cut on Eaton Fire overhang at Wells Fargo; Public Service upgraded (EIX:NYSE)
feed.summary: Wells Fargo downgraded Edison International (EIX) to Underweight with a $59 price target due to concerns over the Eaton Fire liability and uncertainty surrounding California's liability construct. Despite this, Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) was upgraded by Wells Fargo to Overweight from Equal Weight, with a maintained price target of $72, citing attractive valuation and ongoing PSEG Power restructuring.

feed.title: DuPont appoints W.W. Grainger CEO to board of directors
feed.summary: DuPont has appointed D.G. Macpherson, CEO of W.W. Grainger, to its Board of Directors, effective immediately. Macpherson brings extensive experience in operational excellence, supply chain optimization, and business transformation. DuPont, a global innovation company with a market capitalization of $17.75 billion, has a strong financial health and has maintained dividend payments for 55 consecutive years.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (OZK) Bank OZK Posts Q4 Revenue $440.7M, vs. FactSet Est of $434.6M
feed.summary: Bank OZK (OZK) reported its Q4 revenue at $440.7 million, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $434.6 million. This news follows a recent announcement where the bank increased its quarterly dividend to $0.46 per share from $0.45, payable on January 20, 2026. Despite the revenue beat, the bank's Q4 earnings reportedly fell, with EPS at $1.53 against an estimated $1.55.

feed.title: United Airlines shares rise after carrier posts record revenue
feed.summary: United Airlines Holdings Inc. reported better-than-expected fourth-quarter profits and record revenue, driven by strong demand from premium and loyalty customers. The airline's shares jumped over 4% in extended trading following the announcement. United also provided an optimistic 2026 adjusted EPS forecast and highlighted significant growth in passenger numbers and premium revenue in 2025.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Raises Microchip (MCHP) Target to $85, Calls It Top Mid-Cap Pick
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has increased its price target for Microchip Technology (MCHP) to $85 from $80, maintaining an Overweight rating and naming it their "top mid-cap pick." Analyst Harsh Kumar foresees significant growth potential for the company in 2026, driven by strengthening order momentum, particularly from the industrial sector, and new AI data center parts expected to boost revenue. Microchip Technology designs and sells embedded control solutions across various markets, including industrial, automotive, and aerospace.

feed.title: KeyCorp, facing activist investor heat, tweaks board lineup
feed.summary: KeyCorp is restructuring its board of directors in response to demands from activist investor HoldCo Asset Management, which previously criticized the bank's stock performance and called for the CEO's termination. The changes include appointing Todd Vasos as the new lead independent director and nominating two new directors with extensive banking experience to replace retiring members. KeyCorp also announced an acceleration of share buyback activities and reported strong fourth-quarter earnings, exceeding analyst expectations.

feed.title: Shurgard Self Storage to Release 2025 Full-Year Financial Results on Feb. 26
feed.summary: Shurgard Self Storage Ltd., the European affiliate of Public Storage Inc., will release its 2025 full-year financial results on February 26 at 7 a.m. CET. A management presentation will follow at 10 a.m. CET in London, which will also be live-streamed via Zoom. A replay will be available on the company's website starting February 27.

feed.title: Western Digital to Host Innovation Day 2026 in New York City
feed.summary: Western Digital Corporation announced it will host its Innovation Day event on February 3, 2026, in New York City. The event will highlight key innovations in data storage, particularly those addressing the growing demand from the AI-driven data economy. A live webcast and archived replays will be available on the company's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: AvalonBay Communities Announces 2025 Dividend Income Tax Treatment
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. announced the final income allocations for its 2025 dividend distributions on its Common Stock. The announcement details the tax treatment for four quarterly dividends, classifying portions as ordinary taxable dividends, long-term capital gains, and unrecaptured Section 1250 gain, and advises shareholders to consult their tax advisors. The company, an S&P 500 equity REIT, develops and manages apartment communities across major metropolitan areas in the U.S.

feed.title: Pentair to Release Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings and Host Investor Conference Call on February 3
feed.summary: Pentair plc (NYSE:PNR) announced it will release its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on Tuesday, February 3, 2026, before the New York Stock Exchange opens. The company will host an investor conference call at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Related presentation materials will be made available on the "Investor Relations" section of Pentair's website prior to the call.

feed.title: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. to Announce Fourth Quarter 2025 Results
feed.summary: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. (KREF) announced it will release its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results on Tuesday, February 3, 2026, after market close. A conference call to discuss these results is scheduled for Wednesday, February 4, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET. The company is a real estate finance firm focusing on senior loans secured by commercial real estate.

feed.title: Net Lease Office declares special cash distribution of $6.75 per share
feed.summary: Net Lease Office Properties (NLOP) announced that its Board of Trustees declared a special cash distribution of $6.75 per common share, totaling approximately $100 million. Shareholders of record as of January 30, 2026, will receive this distribution on February 17, 2026. To be eligible, shareholders must hold their shares through the payment date; selling before the February 18 ex-dividend date will forfeit the distribution.

feed.title: Nicolet Bankshares, Inc. Announces Record Earnings
feed.summary: Nicolet Bankshares, Inc. reported record net income of $151 million and diluted earnings per share of $9.78 for the full year 2025, representing a 21.5% increase over 2024. The company also announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.32 per share, payable on March 16, 2026. This significant financial growth was attributed to strong core deposit and loan growth and an improved net interest margin, positioning Nicolet for its upcoming merger with MidWest One.

feed.title: W.W. Grainger chief D.G. Macpherson takes seat on DuPont board
feed.summary: DuPont (NYSE: DD) has announced the appointment of D.G. Macpherson, current Chairman and CEO of W.W. Grainger, to its Board of Directors. Macpherson brings extensive experience in operational excellence, supply chain optimization, and business transformation, which DuPont CEO Lori Koch believes will be invaluable to the company's growth strategy. He holds degrees from Stanford University and Kellogg School of Management and previously served on the International Paper Company Board of Directors.

feed.title: Prudential Rolls Out AI, Data-Based Enhancements for Adviser Program
feed.summary: Prudential Advisors, the retail arm of Prudential Financial Inc., has announced new AI and data science enhancements to its Advisor Leads programs. These updates embed AI across the proprietary platform, Prudential Advisors Connect, to generate customer insights and prioritize leads most likely to convert, improving adviser efficiency. The company emphasizes governance and responsible AI practices, incorporating continuous feedback and integrating third-party data to create more comprehensive client profiles and deeper adviser insights.

feed.title: Coca-Cola and Procter & Gamble outperform on a bruising day overall for U.S. stocks (KO:NYSE)
feed.summary: Coca-Cola (KO) and Procter & Gamble (PG) showed strong performance on a challenging Tuesday for U.S. stocks. The broader market experienced a decline following President Donald Trump's threat of new tariffs on European nations. These consumer staples companies managed to outperform amidst the overall negative market sentiment.

feed.title: Cardinal Health Launches ContinuCare Pathway for Home Delivery of Diabetes Supplies
feed.summary: Cardinal Health has launched its new ContinuCare Pathway program, enabling patients with diabetes to receive home delivery of diabetes supplies, including continuous glucose monitors. The program, which streamlines the referral process from retail pharmacies to Cardinal Health at-Home Solutions, has expanded significantly since Advanced Diabetes Supply (ADS) was acquired by Cardinal Health in 2025. Publix Super Markets has already enrolled its entire pharmacy network, spanning nearly 1,400 pharmacies, into the ContinuCare Pathway.

feed.title: MGM Sets Renewable Energy Example for U.S. Tourism Industry
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has achieved a significant clean energy milestone by powering up to 100% of its daytime electricity needs on the Las Vegas Strip with solar power, including a new 115-megawatt solar generation and 400 megawatt-hour battery storage project. This move underscores the U.S. tourism industry's continued commitment to renewable energy, driven by economic benefits, climate risk concerns, and customer expectations, despite shifting federal policy. MGM's investment in large-scale solar and storage solutions provides long-term cost stability and strengthens business resilience, serving as an example for the industry.

feed.title: MRCC (NASDAQ: MRCC) sets vote on asset sale and merger into HRZN
feed.summary: Monroe Capital Corporation (MRCC) is asking its stockholders to approve a two-step transaction involving an asset sale to Monroe Capital Income Plus Corporation (MCIP) and a subsequent stock-for-stock merger into Horizon Technology Finance (HRZN). Both companies' boards, guided by independent special committees, unanimously recommend approval of the proposals at special meetings scheduled for March 13, 2026. The merger is intended to be a tax-free reorganization for MRCC stockholders, with an exchange ratio based on the net asset value per share of both companies shortly before closing.

feed.title: Cintas (CTAS) Maintains Quarterly Dividend at $0.45 per Share
feed.summary: Cintas Corporation (CTAS) has declared a consistent quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share, offering a forward yield of 0.93%. The company, a significant player in the business services industry with a market cap of $78.14 billion, demonstrates strong financial health with robust profitability and a solid balance sheet. Valuation metrics suggest CTAS might be trading near historical lows, potentially signaling an entry point for value investors, though technical indicators suggest it's approaching overbought territory.

feed.title: Net Lease Office Properties Declares Special Cash Distribution of $6.75 Per Share
feed.summary: Net Lease Office Properties (NLOP) has announced a special cash distribution of $6.75 per share, totaling approximately $100 million, to be paid on February 17, 2026, to shareholders of record by January 30, 2026. This distribution follows the sale of three office properties, including those leased by KBR and Google, for gross proceeds of about $130.6 million. The news has led to a positive market reaction, with NLOP's stock gaining 5.20%.

feed.title: Net Lease Office Properties Declares Special Cash Distribution of $6.75 Per Share
feed.summary: Net Lease Office Properties announced a special cash distribution of $6.75 per common share, totaling approximately $100 million, payable on February 17, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 30, 2026. The company also reported the sale of three office properties for gross proceeds of $130.6 million. Shareholders must hold their shares through the payment date to receive the distribution.

feed.title: Bank OZK Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings
feed.summary: Bank OZK (Nasdaq: OZK) reported fourth-quarter 2025 net income of $171.9 million (down 3.5% YoY) and full-year 2025 net income of $699.3 million (down 0.1% YoY). Despite the slight decrease in net income, the bank achieved record diluted EPS of $6.18 for the full year, driven by significant loan and deposit growth. The company also announced a conference call for January 21, 2026, to discuss these results.

feed.title: RB Global to Release Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Host Conference Call on February 17, 2026
feed.summary: RB Global, Inc. announced that it will release its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results after the market closes on Tuesday, February 17th, 2026. The company will host a conference call on the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time to discuss these results. Analysts and institutional investors can pre-register for the call, and a webcast replay will be available on RB Global's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp CEO warns of big hit from Trump’s credit card cap
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp CEO Gunjan Kedia has warned that former President Donald Trump's proposed 10% cap on credit card interest rates would severely impact over 90% of the bank's clients and the broader economy, with a "crushing" effect on 50% of customers. The banking industry is awaiting clarity on the January 20 deadline for this cap, which analysts believe would require legislation and is unlikely to pass. Kedia also mentioned that the bank's fourth-quarter profit exceeded expectations due to increased interest payments and fee revenue growth.

feed.title: Lululemon pulls Get Low line from website after customer feedback
feed.summary: Lululemon has temporarily removed its new "Get Low" workout wear line from its website due to customer complaints about ill-fitting and sheer products. The company stated it is pausing online sales to understand feedback and provide product education, but will continue selling the line in North American stores and internationally online. This incident marks another instance where Lululemon has had to address product issues, occurring amid a search for a new CEO and pressure from investors.

feed.title: United Air Beats Wall Street Estimates on Strong Premium Demand
feed.summary: United Airlines Holdings Inc. surpassed Wall Street's fourth-quarter earnings expectations, driven by robust demand from high-spending domestic and international passengers. The airline reported adjusted earnings per share of $3.10, exceeding the $2.92 analyst consensus. This strong performance, as the Chicago-based carrier anticipates, points to a positive outlook for 2026.

feed.title: Sprouts Farmers Market to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings on February 19, 2026
feed.summary: Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc. (Nasdaq: SFM) announced it will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 28, 2025, after market close on Thursday, February 19, 2026. Management will host a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results, with a webcast available on the company's investor relations website. A replay of the webcast will be accessible from approximately 8:00 p.m. ET on February 19, 2026.

feed.title: Hasbro to Announce Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings on February 10, 2026
feed.summary: Hasbro, Inc. announced it will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, before the market opens. The company will host a webcast of its earnings conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time, with financial information and presentation slides available on its Investor Relations website. A replay of the call will also be available on the same site for 12 months.

feed.title: 181 million flyers, record revenue: inside United Airlines 2025
feed.summary: United Airlines reported strong financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025, exceeding Wall Street expectations with record revenue and increased EPS. The company reached its highest annual operating revenue in history at $59.1 billion and flew a record 181 million passengers. Despite a government shutdown impacting Q4 pre-tax earnings by $250 million, United demonstrated operational reliability and continued investments in customer experience and fleet expansion.

feed.title: Vertex to Announce Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results on February 12th
feed.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated (Nasdaq: VRTX) will report its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on Thursday, February 12, 2026, after the financial markets close. The company will host a conference call and webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss these results. Details for accessing the call and webcast are provided for investors.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation Stock: A Deep Dive Into Analyst Perspectives (15 Ratings)
feed.summary: Fifteen analysts have recently rated Rockwell Automation (NYSE: ROK), exhibiting a mixed sentiment with an average 12-month price target of $428.47, indicating an 8.01% increase from the previous average. The company, a pure-play industrial automation firm, demonstrates strong financial health with high market capitalization, a 13.81% revenue growth rate (though lagging peers), impressive net margin, and exceptional ROE and ROA, despite a high debt-to-equity ratio.

feed.title: The Truth About Canadian National Railway: Why Everyone Is Suddenly Watching This Old-School Stock
feed.summary: Canadian National Railway (CNI) is gaining quiet attention on finance social media for its stable, long-term growth potential, contrasting with flashy tech stocks. Despite its "boring" image, CNI operates a massive, resilient freight rail network across North America, generating consistent cash flow and dividends. The article details why CNI is a strong contender for patient, long-term investors seeking stability over speculative gains, comparing it to rivals like CPKC.

feed.title: Boeing stock hits 52-week high at 248.75 USD
feed.summary: Boeing (BA) stock has reached a 52-week high of $248.75, representing a 44.77% increase over the past year, driven by renewed air travel demand, increased aircraft orders, and strategic cost-cutting. The company is experiencing strong production for its 787 Dreamliner and favorable labor agreements, despite facing regulatory scrutiny over safety concerns. Bernstein SocGen Group raised its price target to $298, reaffirming an Outperform rating.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics buys Texas Pacific Land (TPL) share at $328
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a significant owner of Texas Pacific Land Corp (TPL), purchased 1 share of common stock for $328 on January 16, 2026, increasing its direct ownership to over 3.48 million shares. This news follows recent company updates including a strategic partnership with Bolt Data & Energy, a three-for-one stock split, and KeyBanc initiating coverage with an Overweight rating, despite the company missing Q3 2025 earnings and revenue forecasts.

feed.title: Himax, Broadcom, KLA Corporation, Impinj, and Qualcomm Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Several technology stocks, including Himax, Broadcom, KLA Corporation, Impinj, and Qualcomm, experienced a downturn in trading. This decline was attributed to escalating geopolitical tensions between the US and Europe concerning the control of Greenland, which triggered a broad risk-off sentiment in asset markets. Investors reacted negatively to President Trump's push for the US acquisition of Greenland, leading to fears of trade confrontations and new tariffs against European allies.

feed.title: Lake Street Raises Ondas Holdings (ONDS) Price Target to $19.00
feed.summary: Lake Street has increased its price target for Ondas Holdings (ONDS) to $19.00 from $10.00, maintaining a Buy rating. This 90% adjustment by analyst Max Michaelis reflects strong confidence in the company's future, despite Wall Street analysts forecasting an average target of $12.00, implying a 8.57% downside from the current price. Ondas Holdings designs and manufactures Software Defined Radio (SDR) technology and focuses on its Ondas Networks and Ondas Autonomous Systems segments.

feed.title: Crown Castle (CCI): UBS Lowers Price Target to $116 While Mainta
feed.summary: UBS has lowered its price target for Crown Castle (CCI) from $127.00 to $116.00, while maintaining a "Buy" rating. This adjustment follows a pattern of reduced price targets from various analysts, including Scotiabank, JP Morgan, Wells Fargo, and Barclays, all suggesting a cautious outlook on Crown Castle. The company, which owns or manages about 40,000 wireless towers in the US and plans to divest its fiber business, has an average analyst target price of $111.12, implying a 28.06% upside from its current price, though GuruFocus estimates a downside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Allen Morris Co. Secures $132.5 Million Construction Loan from Bank OZK for Ponce Park Coral Gables
feed.summary: The Allen Morris Co. has secured a $132.5 million construction loan from Bank OZK for Ponce Park, an ultra-luxury condominium development in Coral Gables. This project will feature 58 residences, 25,000 square feet of retail space, and amenities like a rooftop pool and spa. Construction began in December 2025, with completion expected in early 2028, and residences are priced from $2.9 million.

feed.title: Earnings Summary: A snapshot of 3M Company’s Q4 2025 results
feed.summary: 3M Company announced its Q4 2025 financial results, with sales increasing 2.1% year-over-year to $6.1 billion. While reported earnings per share decreased by 20% to $1.07, adjusted earnings rose 9% to $1.83 per share. The company returned $0.9 billion to shareholders and provided a positive outlook for fiscal 2026, expecting adjusted sales growth of approximately 4%.

feed.title: Ondas Holdings Inc (ONDS) Stock Rises as Analysts Boost Price Targets Up to $25
feed.summary: Ondas Holdings Inc. (ONDS) stock has risen following several analyst price target increases, with HC Wainwright boosting its target from $12 to $25. The company announced optimistic revenue forecasts for Q4 and fiscal year 2026, alongside a significant 180% increase in its backlog to $65.3 million. Despite short-term volatility, ONDS shares have surged 562.44% over the past year, reflecting strong market confidence in its growth prospects in autonomous aerial and robotics markets.

feed.title: NetApp (NASDAQ:NTAP) Stock Price Down 7.3% - What's Next?
feed.summary: NetApp (NASDAQ:NTAP) shares fell 7.3% to $96.29 on sharply lighter volume despite an earnings beat and bullish analyst ratings with an average price target of $124.33. The company reported EPS of $2.05 on revenue of $1.71 billion, exceeding estimates, and provided FY2026 EPS guidance of $7.75–$8.05. Institutional investors hold approximately 92% of the stock, while insiders have engaged in modest selling.

feed.title: Halliburton Q4 Preview: $5.41B Revenue, Venezuela Opportunities Highlighted
feed.summary: Halliburton is projected to report Q4 revenue of $5.41 billion and EPS of 55 cents, facing competitive pressures despite outperforming expectations in previous quarters. Analysts have increased price targets for HAL following a strong Q3, indicating confidence in its future. The company is poised to benefit from potential U.S. drilling opportunities in Venezuela, driven by investments in differentiated technologies.

feed.title: Gartner stock hits 52-week low at 222.5 USD
feed.summary: Gartner Inc. (NYSE: IT) stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $222.50, representing a 57.55% decline over the past year. This downturn comes despite Gartner reporting strong Q3 2025 earnings, surpassing Wall Street expectations, and announcing a new notes offering for corporate purposes. Analyst ratings are mixed, with Truist Securities maintaining a "Buy" rating and a $300 price target, while UBS and BMO Capital have "Neutral" and "Market Perform" ratings respectively, with lower price targets, citing concerns about AI disruption and slowing contract value growth.
